approval.scope: Human-initiated STOCK_DAY_ALL capture, 1 GET per trading day, raw retained caller-owned under outputs/ with sha256, attribution 資料來源：臺灣證券交易所. No backfill.
approval.digest_correction: Recomputed 2026-07-22 after the initially quoted digest was found not to match the file; content unchanged.

acceptance_notes: This approval activates forward accumulation only; the abandoned option C per-session loop remains superseded.
Each daily capture is human-initiated; normalized read-model updates run offline from retained raw files.
Calendar rollover: each new year requires a separately approved calendar capture.
